name: Akash Yadav
title: Senior Android Developer
summary: Android Developer with 5+ years of experience building high-performance mobile applications using Java, Kotlin, and Flutter. Proven track record in fintech and digital payment solutions. Expertise in creating scalable, user-centric applications with clean architecture. Strong background in cross-platform development and backend integration with Spring Boot.

highlights: Developed and maintained scalable Android applications for digital payment solutions, serving thousands of merchants and processing high-volume transactions
Led a team of 3 developers in building robust fintech features including payment gateway integration and real-time processing with 99.9% uptime
Implemented code obfuscation using ProGuard and R8 to secure sensitive financial data and prevent reverse engineering
Designed and implemented deep linking architecture for seamless navigation from marketing campaigns and payment requests
Spearheaded Java to Kotlin migration project, reducing codebase by 25% while mentoring team on Kotlin best practices
Translated Figma wireframes into production-ready UI using Jetpack Compose and XML layouts
Optimized app performance reducing crash rates by 40% and improving launch time by 35%
Developed key features for a YC-backed fintech startup's Android application, contributing to product-market fit
Led development of invoice management and GST billing features used by 10,000+ small businesses across India
Implemented deep linking for invoice sharing and payment collection, increasing conversion rates by 25%
Converted Figma designs into responsive XML layouts and Jetpack Compose UI components
Implemented real-time data synchronization using Cloud Firestore for seamless offline-first experience
Developed and maintained Android application features for a freelancing platform connecting clients with professionals
Implemented user authentication, profile management, and real-time chat functionality
Enhanced app UI/UX based on user feedback, increasing user retention by 20%
Utilized Flutter for cross-platform development, reducing development time by 40%

projects.title: HDFC Bank SmartHub Vyapar
projects.description: Enterprise-grade digital payment application for HDFC Bank merchants with 100K+ downloads on Play Store.
highlights: Implemented secure payment processing with code obfuscation
Built deep linking flows for payment requests and notifications
Modern merchant dashboard in Jetpack Compose

projects.title: neo for merchants (Axis Bank)
projects.description: Merchant payment solution for Axis Bank with real-time transaction processing and analytics.
highlights: QR code payments and settlement tracking
Business analytics dashboard
Optimized for low-end device performance

projects.title: Invoicing Billing GST - Swipe
projects.description: Invoice and GST billing application serving 10,000+ small businesses across India.
highlights: Offline-first architecture with real-time sync
Custom PDF generation engine for GST compliant invoices

achievements: Successfully delivered 10+ production applications across fintech and e-commerce
Mentored 3 junior developers in Android development and Kotlin migration
Consistently recognized for code quality, meeting 95% of sprint commitments
Delivered an international banking application in a record timeline of 3 months, receiving founder recognition and a formal certificate for record-time delivery
